# Adventourist
> Boutique travel planning company. Mumbai, India. Founded 2018 by Minal Joshi.
> Tagline: "Travel Designed For You" | 4.8★ Google | Crafting journeys since 2018 | Zero booking fees

## About
Adventourist crafts personalised, hassle-free holidays for families, couples, and friend groups.
Every trip is custom-built — no templates, no packages. Direct access to real planners.

## Destinations
India: Leh Ladakh, Himachal Pradesh, Kashmir, Kerala, Rajasthan, Uttarakhand, Andaman, Meghalaya, Karnataka, Sikkim
International: Bali, Thailand, Sri Lanka, Singapore, Vietnam, Seychelles, Malaysia, Dubai, Maldives, Kenya Safari, Greece, Turkey

## Trip Types
Family holidays · Honeymoons · Anniversary trips · Girls trips · Friend groups · Workations · Wellness retreats

## What's Included (typically)
Hotels, airport transfers, sightseeing, daily breakfast, 24/7 support. Flights quoted separately.
